name: Kim's Rude Awakenings
overview: Join domestic diplomats, Kim and Mike, as they attempt to overhaul the country's rudest and messiest families. Sticklers for order and cleanliness, these two firecrackers are determined to clean up our acts, our homes, and our heads. And from mountains of laundry and extreme clutter, to filth and general bad behavior, there's no problem they won't tackle.

trailers.title: A House That Is An Impassable Biohazard! | Kim's Rude Awakening | FULL EPISODE | House to Home
